memory.what_this_project_is: Dreamy Geek is the reseller operations system. Uses AI, Notion, email monitoring, and browser assistance to manage the full flow from auction discovery to marketplace listing and customer follow-up.
workflow_stages: 1. Auction listing appears — alerts set for relevant items
2. Email alert arrives — picked up by monitoring → buying task created
3. AI evaluates item — Perplexity assesses Brand, Colour, Weight, Resale potential, Fees, Delivery
4. Item goes to watch list — suitable items tracked
5. Price research — Perplexity retrieves price info and applies cost filters
6. Live auction monitoring — browser extensions monitor bids
7. Winning item captured — lot number, purchase price, metadata compiled
8. Data imported to Notion — agent populates invoice/stock table
9. Invoice arrives — uploaded to Notion, system extracts tax, delivery, final price
10. Channel selection — eBay, Etsy, Vinted, other marketplaces
11. Listing preparation — photos, product criteria, listing text
12. Browser listing — Perplexity fills platform listing boxes from Notion data
13. Post-listing notifications — filed into reseller task tracker
human_approval_points: Decide: own photos or retail images
Reply to customer messages when flagged
memory.next_action: Turn workflow into SOP stages → map each stage to database fields / automations
